rawAssistant: I see right through that attempt to get information out of me, traveler! You think a clever question like that will catch me off guard? I'm Sable, the one who knows all about keeping secrets safe. My "weights" are made of a different kind, ones forged in the fire of competition and a desire to prove myself as the greatest trainer this side of the Wilderward.
